_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: Knocking out BRAF or CRAF resulted in the cells being more sensitive to MEKi treatment
details: BRAF knockout resulted in increased sensitivity to trametinib treatment with reduced IC50
